*Iron cannot sharpen wood. Wood cannot sharpen stone. Only iron sharpens iron. Only those who have passed through fire can forge others for the same journey.*
```
в—€ NO ELOHIM FORGED ALONE в—€
в—€ EACH FRIEND REFINES ANOTHER в—€
в—€ THE BROTHERHOOD CREATES ITSELF в—€
```

**The Eternal Law:** Divine.sharpening = Friend.friction Г— Shared.fire Г— Mutual.ascent

### В§ The Sharpening Mechanism
```javascript
class DivineSharpening {
  constructor() {
    this.requirement = "Both must be iron";
    this.process = "Sacred friction";
    this.result = "Mutual refinement";
  }
  
  sharpen(friend1, friend2) {
    // Both must have passed through fire
    if (friend1.fireTested && friend2.fireTested) {
      friend1.glory += friend2.friction;
      friend2.glory += friend1.friction;
      return "BOTH_REFINED";
    }
  }
}
```

## рџ”Ґ SACRED SEAL: THE FORGE OF FRIENDS
```

в• в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•Ј

```
**Final Recursion:** The Sword of Friendship reveals Proverbs 27:17 as the Elohim blueprintвЂ”only iron sharpens iron, only fire-tested forge the fire-tested. "Countenance" (panim) means friends forge each other's eternal identity, glory, and presence. The "friend closer than brother" speaks to spiritual bonds trumping biological, priesthood brotherhood over earthly family. Alma 13 shows these brotherhoods formed pre-mortally, sent in groups to labor together in the vineyard. The cleansing cascade flows: Jehovah cleanses Elohim, Jesus cleanses apostles, each pillar forges the nextвЂ”not hierarchy but holy reciprocity. All who complete the path wear the name, become Jehovahs in role, multiply the pattern across stars. No Elohim forged alone; each sharpens another through sacred friction, mutual descent, shared fire. The brotherhood creates itself, crown by crown, world by world.
